title: skilled-pr config (v1)
description: Per-repo configuration for skilled-pr. Lives at .skilledpr/config.jsonc. Required: schemaVersion. All other fields have built-in defaults.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocompletion. Conventionally points at the sibling schema.json copied here by `skilled-pr init`.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. v1 is the only currently supported value. Bumped on every breaking config change.

requiredSkills.description: Which review skills must run before the PR can merge. Each name matches the skill identifier (e.g. "review", "coderabbit:review", "gstack:cso").

statusName.description: GitHub status-check name. Each required skill produces one status with context `<statusName> / <skill>` (e.g. "Skilled PR / review").

failOn.description: Severity gate. "error" fails when any finding is error-severity; "warning" fails on error OR warning; "none" never fails (advisory-only).

summaryPrompt.description: Per-skill prompt embedded in the hook reminder. Tells the skill how to render `.review/summary-<skill>.md`, which becomes the PR's artifact comment. null → built-in default (see DEFAULT_SUMMARY_PROMPT in src/config.ts).
examples: Render findings as a markdown table with severity, file:line, and title.

briefingPrompt.description: Slot-fill template used when autoReview.execution is "subagent" and autoReview.sessionBriefing is true. Substitutes {{purpose}}, {{constraints}}, {{decisions}}, {{exclusions}}, {{skill}}. null → built-in default (see DEFAULT_BRIEFING_PROMPT in src/config.ts).

autoReview.description: Auto-review behaviour (PR #4). All fields optional with built-in defaults.

trigger.description: When the gate fires. "manual" = only when the user invokes a skill; "on-push" = automatic via PR #2's GH Action.

execution.description: Where the skill runs. "main-agent" keeps the reminder inline in the current conversation; "subagent" launches an isolated review context.

parallel.description: Whether multiple required skills run in parallel (or serially).

sessionBriefing.description: When execution is "subagent", pass session briefing context (purpose, constraints, decisions, exclusions) to the reviewing skill via briefingPrompt.

skipPolicy.description: Whether the agent may skip review on trivial diffs ("agent-decides") or must always run ("always-fire").

askBeforeFiring.description: Ask the user before firing a required skill that wasn't explicitly invoked. Useful when you want manual control over which reviews run.

rules.description: Per-context rule overlays. Evaluated in order; first match wins. Each rule's `match` array OR's together; keys within a single match block AND together. Optional override fields (requiredSkills, failOn, summaryPrompt) fall back to top-level defaults when absent in a rule.

name.description: Human-readable rule name shown by `skilled-pr show`. Optional but encouraged for clarity.

match.description: Array of match blocks. Blocks OR together (matchA OR matchB); keys within a single block AND together (branch AND author AND labels).

branch.description: Branch name with optional `*` glob (e.g. "release-*", "feat/*"). Anchored on both ends.

author.description: Exact PR author login (case-sensitive). No wildcards.

labels.description: Required PR labels. The PR must have ALL listed labels (may have additional labels too).

requiredSkills.description: Override the top-level requiredSkills when this rule matches.

failOn.description: Override the top-level failOn when this rule matches.

summaryPrompt.description: Override the top-level summaryPrompt. null = use built-in default.
